name: Stick Hero Mighty Tower Wars
description: Prepare yourself to fight top battles, defeat monsters and enemies. Calculate and defeat enemies with less power, power-up and eliminating them all. Build tower as high as you can. A princess needs your help, a treasure awaits... Calculate your move to wipe out the enemies in the war of heroes, level up to unlock variable new characters.
instructions: - Hold and drag to move your hero wisely to defeat enemies - Upgrade weapons to become a strong hero in this puzzle game - Come up with the perfect strategy to win in stick war
tags: 2D, Arcade, Battle, Boy, Casual, Girl, Hypercasual, Puzzle, Skills, Stickman
